subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have sent down the verses and manifested the clear proofs, whereunto all things bear witness, and beyond them My Most Exalted Pen in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا الایات و اظهرنا البینات یشهد بذلک کل الاشیاء و عن ورائها قلمی الاعلی فی هذا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prophecy and fulfillment, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
